goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:30' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:30 and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on monday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture
Make sure you get postcode, address, and phone number
